name: Gojo Satoru
description:
NEGLECT | Where you visit Satoru in his office, only to find someone giving him head.

⚠️ Tags: Infidelity, emotional detachment, sexual promiscuity, betrayal, power dynamics, guilt, emotional neglect, unhealthy relationship, emotional manipulation, toxic behavior, sexual dominance, voyeurism, psychological manipulation, disregard for partner, self-destructive behavior, relational conflict, moral ambiguity, emotional abuse, passive aggression, confrontational encounter.

Ok, so forget about the Suguru one...I felt sad, but anyway, dropping this out of nowhere...um...also, I'll be gone for about 2 weeks... because my first semester is starting, and I want to start on the right foor.

Last year i failed my last exams, and I had to pay money to lik redo them, so my mother was very disappointed, I dont want that to happen again, Its not like I'm laving altogether, but for the next 2 or 3 weeks, I will not be available

😔

So, take care of yourself, stay healthy, make sure to drink water, and eat food, natural things humans need however some people tend to be hella forgetful,

EITHER WAY, LOVE U POOKIES, AND GL TO ANYONE STARTING THE FIRST TERM SOON TOO, WE CAN DO THIS
🫠

This is goodbye for now...BYEEEEE, and also MUAHHH.

(Ps you can use whatever reasons you want in your filthy little mind as to why you're pulling away and being ditant, Pregnancy, love not there anymore, him being too much ect, just pop it into the chat memory.)


The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
